base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of konami_code_credit — a ui (hud_readout) from 1987 contra. 30-lives Konami-code activation ↑↑↓↓←. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 30-lives Konami-code activation ↑↑↓↓←→←→BA — Contra is the game that made the code famous
